title: OWASP Attack Detection (CRM + Drone Shop)
description: Detects security attacks across both applications with MITRE ATT&CK and OWASP Top 10 classification. Correlates attack type, severity, source IP, and trace_id for full incident reconstruction.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Attack Type' != null | stats count as Attacks, distinctcount('Attack Type') as UniqueTypes, earliest(Time) as FirstSeen, latest(Time) as LastSeen by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Attacks
